products.name: Moonbound Howl
products.description: A wolf beneath a fractured moon, channeling instinct, ancestry, and the pull of the unseen.

products.name: Silent Watcher
products.description: A lone wolf rendered in stark contrast, symbolizing vigilance, intelligence, and quiet authority.

products.name: Roar of the Divide
products.description: A symmetrical tiger visage split by chaos and color, representing duality, dominance, and primal balance.

products.name: Emberclaw
products.description: A tiger emerging from raw texture and flame tones, embodying ferocity, momentum, and untamed will.

products.name: The Long Way Home
products.description: A surreal landscape anchored by a solitary traveler, evoking reflection, passage, and inner return.
